queries.question: What description of events is associated with each festival?
queries.sql: SELECT Events.Description  from Festivals_Events join Events on Festivals_Events.EventTypeID = Events.EventTypeID join Festivals on Festivals_Events.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID   GROUP BY Festivals_Events.EventTypeID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Festivals_Events.FestivalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Festivals)

queries.question: What description of events is associated with each festival?
queries.sql: select festivals.name , events.description from Festivals_Events join Events on Festivals_Events.EventTypeID = Events.EventTypeID join Festivals on Festivals_Events.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?festivals_events a :Festivals_Events .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?festivals_events p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals_events p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
  ?festivals p:name ?name .
  ?events p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the name and description of the events that every festival has
queries.sql: SELECT Events.EventName, Events.Description  from Festivals_Events join Events on Festivals_Events.EventTypeID = Events.EventTypeID join Festivals on Festivals_Events.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID   GROUP BY Festivals_Events.EventTypeID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Festivals_Events.FestivalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Festivals)

queries.question: Show me the name and description of the events that every festival has
queries.sql: select festivals.name , events.eventname , events.description from Festivals_Events join Events on Festivals_Events.EventTypeID = Events.EventTypeID join Festivals on Festivals_Events.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?eventname ?description WHERE {
  ?festivals_events a :Festivals_Events .
  ?events a :Events .
  ?festivals_events p:hasEvents ?events .
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals_events p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
  ?festivals p:name ?name .
  ?events p:EventName ?eventname .
  ?events p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: What events can I see at each festival?
queries.sql: SELECT Events.EventName  from Festivals_Events join Events on Festivals_Events.EventTypeID = Events.EventTypeID join Festivals on Festivals_Events.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID   GROUP BY Festivals_Events.EventTypeID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Festivals_Events.FestivalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Festivals)

SELECT ?name ?eventname WHERE {
